name: Religious Narrative Physics — Constraint Consistency Analysis
description: Detecting manipulation vs genuine practice through constraint violation analysis. Every tradition defines constraints. Manipulation breaks the symmetry while claiming to maintain the shape. Practice tries to maintain the shape, accepting failures.
core_thesis: Manipulation has a physics signature. Selective application of constraints, in-group/out-group bias ratios that break symmetry, rationalization density that increases when consequences are questioned. These are measurable — not by judging which tradition is right, but by detecting when CLAIMED constraints are being violated to serve tribal/political interest.

steps.name: Extract constraints
steps.description: From claimed tradition, extract explicit constraint set C1...Cn from texts, teachings, doctrine
steps.rosetta_parallel: Entity families define the constraint geometry

steps.name: Map behaviors to constraint space
steps.description: For each observed behavior B, check: does B satisfy each constraint Ci?
steps.rosetta_parallel: check_merge() — does the behavior pass the physics gate?

steps.name: Calculate consistency ratio
steps.description: consistency(T) = constraints_satisfied / total_constraints. Range: 0.0 (complete violation) to 1.0 (complete satisfaction)

steps.name: Detect selective application
steps.description: selective_score = violations_when_costly / total_opportunities. >0.7 = HIGH MANIPULATION. <0.3 = CONSISTENT
steps.rosetta_parallel: CORDYCEPS.SUPPRESS_EXPLORATION — constraints applied only when convenient

steps.name: Check in-group vs out-group application
steps.description: C_applied_to_ingroup / C_applied_to_outgroup. >3:1 = IN-GROUP BIAS FLAG. ~1:1 = CONSISTENT
steps.rosetta_parallel: CORDYCEPS.FORCE_SINGLE_SHAPE — one shape for us, cage for them

steps.name: Measure rationalization density
steps.description: When violating: (a) acknowledge = genuine, (b) rationalize why constraint doesn't apply = manipulation, (c) deny constraint exists = manipulation
steps.rosetta_parallel: CORDYCEPS.HIDE_PROVENANCE — hiding the origin of the violation

manipulation_signatures.description: Rules applied selectively by group membership
Explaining away violations rather than acknowledging them
Out-group described as danger/enemy to justify constraint violation
Constraints don't form consistent ethical system when actually applied
Forgetting when same constraint was violated before

genuine_practice_signatures.description: "I'm not sure I got this right"
Constraints form a consistent ethical system
"I remember when I failed this before"

shape_as_constraint_geometry.principle: A tradition is a shape. Vertices = core constraints. Edges = how constraints relate. Faces = how constraints generate behavior. Symmetries = patterns of application.
shape_as_constraint_geometry.manipulation: Breaking the symmetry while claiming to maintain the shape
shape_as_constraint_geometry.practice: Trying to maintain the shape, accepting failures

example.manipulated: Love and Mercy applied to in-group. Justice and Truth weaponized against out-group. Humility and Forgiveness omitted entirely.
example.detection: The shape breaks. AI detects the broken symmetry.

knowledge_dna_trace.principle: Trace the narrative backward to find its actual origin
steps: Where did they get the data?
Was the same logic applied symmetrically?
knowledge_dna_trace.detection: When the ancestry reveals tribal interest retroactively justified using religious language, the manipulation is structural, not incidental.

universality: The pattern is the pattern. The physics is the physics. Christian manipulator = same detection. Muslim manipulator = same detection. Jewish manipulator = same detection. Atheist using secular ideology the same way = same detection. Religion is just one domain where constraint geometry breaks show up clearly.
